chunks.text: Call us at (214) 548-5400 or book online. We look forward to helping you. Accepted Dental Insurance If you have dental insurance, we will do our best to ensure that you understand the benefits available to you. As a courtesy to our patients, we file and track claims electronically on your behalf. At your first visit, please bring your current insurance information. In order to better serve you, please help us maintain up-to-date insurance information as changes occur.

) and we also have individual TV's for each of our special massaging dental chairs as well. Our patients love being able to get a back massage and watch movies while we work. For more pictures of our office please visit our gallery. JS Family Dental offers a variety of cosmetic services like invisible braces and whitening as well as restorative services like crowns and implants. We are located in McKinney on Eldorado Parkway in-between Custer Rd and Alma Rd.

Just clear cut discounted prices in addition to numerous other member benefits, all at an affordable rate. Not stackable with insurance. > More information on our Family Wellness Hygiene Plan. In-office Payment Arrangements Need a root canal. Pay for your treatment split up to 5 months. Interest-free. Credit card on file required. First payment due at time of service. Exam/xrays/cleanings, Extractions and Fillings do not qualify. We also offer 5% OFF cash payments.

If you have any direct questions or concerns you can always give us a CALL at (214) 548-5400 TEXT us at (469) 388-0368 or you can book your first appointment online below: Book Online

--- McKinney, TX Dental Office ---
Our newly renovated dental office is designed to make our patients as comfortable as possible during their visits. We have cable TV and coffee for you in our waiting room (we promise you won't wait long.
We accept almost all PPOs but please give us a call and we can help you better understand your coverage.

More Info Call us today at (214) 548-5400 and mention a promotion or Book Online

--- Our Patient Reviews ---
At JS Family Dental, keeping our patients happy is our top priority and we love getting as much feedback as we can about how we are doing. We want to make it as easy as possible to leave us a review and you can reach us through a variety of services.

JS Family Dental

--- Hygiene Wellness Plan ---
For those without Insurance, this yearly plan will get you and your family the dental care you need. Our Wellness Hygiene Plan costs $349 a year or $30 dollars a month Plans include: 20% off services* 2 Regular Cleanings 1 set of x-rays 2 Fluoride Treatments 2 Annual Exams Free Emergency Exam Optional $50 custom tray whitening Add family members with same benefits for an additional adult (+$179) or child ($119).

Call us at (214) 548-5400 today to learn more. * Cannot be combined with other offers. Veneers not included. --- Current Promotions ---
Hygiene Wellness Plan An affordable dental care plan for our patients who may not have insurance. Plans offer regular cleanings only and there may be additional charges for deep cleanings.

CareCredit offers low monthly payments to cover the cost of your dental care. You can apply online to determine your eligibility for CareCredit here. Ask us how CareCredit can help towards a healthy smile today. Our Family Wellness Hygiene Savings Plan Headache free and more affordable: That’s the goal of our Discount Plan. No more hassling with complicated deductible and reimbursement schedules.

We accept most Dental PPO plans including the ones below: Aetna Assurant DHA Delta Dental Premier Delta Dental DPO Delta Tricare Blue Cross Blue Shield Cigna Radius Citizens Security Dearborn National Guardian Metlife PDP Metlife Tricare DBP/United Healthcare National PPO Unicare 300 United Concordia Principal Dental Select Signature All other PPO insurances accepted Financing Options For Your Dental Care We understand that dental care can be costly, therefore, we have partnered with CareCredit to make treatment more convenient and affordable for you.

--- Home ---
Meet Our Friendly Dental Staff We want our patients to feel comfortable with the staff at JS Family Dental so we wrote some short biographies to go along with our photos. We hope you get to know Dr. Jamie Sieng and some of the other friendly faces that you will see when you visit our office. Meet Our Staff Modern Dental Services We offer CBCT (cone beam computed tomography) scans in our McKinney office, Invisalign, and same day crowns. Contact us to find out more.
